requirement_topic.en: OCPP, EMC and Communications — Networked Chargers in a Nascent Market
requirement_topic.zh: OCPP、EMC及通信——早期市场中的联网充电桩
requirement_topic.zht: OCPP、EMC及通訊——早期市場中的聯網充電樁

summary.en: Niger does not have a confirmed nationwide public EV charging back-office platform comparable to mature EV markets. For networked chargers, OCPP interoperability, SIM/router support, cybersecurity settings, remote fault reporting, metering data, load management, and French-language operator documentation will likely be imposed by the project owner, fleet operator, donor, EPC, ARSE/NIGELEC process, or charge-point operator. EMC and power-quality evidence should be prepared under the IEC 61000 series because weak distribution feeders and limited grid capacity make harmonics, voltage flicker, surge immunity, and conducted/radiated emissions material project risks.
summary.zh: 未确认尼日尔拥有类似成熟EV市场的全国公共充电后台平台。对于联网充电桩，OCPP互操作、SIM/路由器支持、网络安全设置、远程故障报告、计量数据、负载管理和法语运营文件，很可能由项目业主、车队运营商、捐助方、EPC、ARSE/NIGELEC流程或充电点运营商提出。由于配电馈线薄弱且电网容量有限，应按IEC 61000系列准备EMC和电能质量证据，因为谐波、电压闪变、浪涌抗扰和传导/辐射发射都是实际项目风险。
summary.zht: 未確認尼日擁有類似成熟EV市場的全國公共充電後台平台。對於聯網充電樁，OCPP互操作、SIM/路由器支持、網絡安全設置、遠程故障報告、計量數據、負載管理和法語運營文件，很可能由項目業主、車隊運營商、捐助方、EPC、ARSE/NIGELEC流程或充電點運營商提出。由於配電饋線薄弱且電網容量有限，應按IEC 61000系列準備EMC和電能質量證據，因為諧波、電壓閃變、浪湧抗擾和傳導/輻射發射都是實際項目風險。

standards_or_laws: OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) — back-office communication for networked chargers where specified
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging
Project-owner, donor, NIGELEC, ARSE, EPC, or fleet operator communications specifications

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 communication between the off-board charger and the vehicle battery management system. That CAN-based protocol is not a substitute for OCPP back-office communication and is not interoperable with CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication where a project specifies CCS2. China chargers may support domestic operator platforms or proprietary cloud systems; those interfaces must be verified against the Niger project's OCPP and telecommunications requirements.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023进行非车载充电机与车辆电池管理系统之间的通信。该CAN总线协议不能替代OCPP后台通信，也不能在项目指定CCS2时与CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信互操作。中国充电桩可能支持国内运营商平台或专有云系统；这些接口须按尼日尔项目的OCPP和电信要求逐项验证。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023進行非車載充電機與車輛電池管理系統之間的通訊。該CAN總線協議不能替代OCPP後台通訊，也不能在項目指定CCS2時與CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊互操作。中國充電樁可能支持國內運營商平台或專有雲系統；這些接口須按尼日項目的OCPP和電信要求逐項驗證。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system
China EMC evidence for domestic conformity or tender requirements

gap.en: Exporters should confirm the required OCPP version, backend endpoint, cellular bands, SIM ownership, offline transaction handling, firmware update process, load-management functions, meter-data format, and cybersecurity requirements before shipment. For EMC and grid impact, provide IEC 61000 reports, harmonic current data, surge immunity, conducted and radiated emissions evidence, and site-level mitigation recommendations. A charger with only GB/T 27930 DC communication and a China-only cloud platform is not ready for a Niger networked project without firmware, protocol, and telecom validation.
gap.zh: 出口商应在发货前确认所需OCPP版本、后台端点、蜂窝频段、SIM归属、离线交易处理、固件升级流程、负载管理功能、计量数据格式和网络安全要求。对于EMC和电网影响，应提供IEC 61000报告、谐波电流数据、浪涌抗扰、传导和辐射发射证据，以及站点级缓解建议。仅支持GB/T 27930直流通信和中国专用云平台的充电桩，在未完成固件、协议和电信验证前，不适用于尼日尔联网项目。
gap.zht: 出口商應在發貨前確認所需OCPP版本、後台端點、蜂窩頻段、SIM歸屬、離線交易處理、韌體升級流程、負載管理功能、計量數據格式和網絡安全要求。對於EMC和電網影響，應提供IEC 61000報告、諧波電流數據、浪湧抗擾、傳導和輻射發射證據，以及站點級緩解建議。僅支持GB/T 27930直流通訊和中國專用雲平台的充電樁，在未完成韌體、協議和電信驗證前，不適用於尼日聯網項目。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent — OCPP and telecom requirements become mandatory where specified by the owner/operator/donor; EMC and power-quality evidence is a practical gate for NIGELEC or engineering acceptance
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is China domestic DC vehicle-charger communication and is not an OCPP or CCS2 communication substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Niger networked chargers, verify OCPP, telecoms, EMC, power-quality, and load-management requirements at project level. GB/T 27930 and a China-only cloud platform do not establish Niger back-office or CCS2 communication readiness.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于尼日尔联网充电桩，应按项目核实OCPP、电信、EMC、电能质量和负载管理要求。GB/T 27930和中国专用云平台不能证明其已具备尼日尔后台或CCS2通信准备。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於尼日聯網充電樁，應按項目核實OCPP、電信、EMC、電能質量和負載管理要求。GB/T 27930和中國專用雲平台不能證明其已具備尼日後台或CCS2通訊準備。
